clusters.title: Chinese pastor released from prison after Trump raised his case with Xi Jinping

items.title: Chinese pastor released from prison after Trump raised his case with Xi Jinping
items.standfirst: Ezra Jin Mingri, who founded Beijing’s Zion Church, was detained in October in one of China’s largest crackdowns on a single church in decades.
items.content: Ezra Jin Mingri, who founded Beijing’s Zion Church, was detained in October in one of China’s largest crackdowns on a single church in decades.

items.title: Chinese pastor freed after Donald Trump raised issue of his release with Xi Jinping
items.standfirst: A Chinese pastor has been released from jail after Donald Trump intervened to get him freed, in what his family have described as a "miracle".
items.content: A Chinese pastor has been released from jail after Donald Trump intervened to get him freed, in what his family have described as a "miracle".

items.title: Founder of prominent underground church released from prison in China
items.standfirst: Ezra Jin, founder of Zion Church, lands in the US and reunites with family who are ‘overwhelmed with joy’The founder of one of China’s most prominent underground churches has been released from prison and reunited with his family in the United States.Ezra Jin, the founder of Zion Church, landed in the US on Friday evening. He was one of dozens of church members who were detained in a sweeping crackdown on Christians in October. Continue reading...
items.content: Ezra Jin, founder of Zion Church, lands in the US and reunites with family who are ‘overwhelmed with joy’The founder of one of China’s most prominent underground churches has been released from prison and reunited with his family in the United States.Ezra Jin, the founder of Zion Church, landed in the US on Friday evening. He was one of dozens of church members who were detained in a sweeping crackdown on Christians in October. Continue reading...

ai_summary: Ezra Jin Mingri released from Chinese prison
Trump raised his case with Xi Jinping
Jin founded Beijing’s Zion Church
He was detained in October
Jin has reunited with his family in the US

clusters.title: ITV sells media and entertainment arm to Sky for £1.6bn
clusters.neutral_headline: ITV Sells Media Arm To Sky

items.title: ITV sells media and entertainment arm to Sky for £1.6bn
items.standfirst: The two broadcasters say the deal will create a strong rival to global streaming giants.
items.content: The two broadcasters say the deal will create a strong rival to global streaming giants.

items.title: ITV to Sell Broadcasting Unit to Sky for Up to £1.6 Billion
items.standfirst: ITV Plc has agreed to sell its media and entertainment arm to Comcast Corp.-owned Sky Group Ltd. in a deal worth as much as £1.6 billion ($2.1 billion) including debt.
items.content: ITV Plc has agreed to sell its media and entertainment arm to Comcast Corp.-owned Sky Group Ltd. in a deal worth as much as £1.6 billion ($2.1 billion) including debt.

ai_summary: ITV sells media and entertainment arm
Sky buys arm for up to £1.6 billion
Deal includes debt and creates strong rival
Global streaming giants face new competition
ITV and Sky announce the deal publicly

clusters.title: Russian attacks on Ukraine kill 11 on eve of NATO summit, authorities say

items.title: Russian attacks on Ukraine kill 11 on eve of NATO summit, authorities say
items.standfirst: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy had warned of a likely attack ahead of meeting with US President Donald Trump.
items.content: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy had warned of a likely attack ahead of meeting with US President Donald Trump.

items.title: Zelensky warns of new Russian attacks as battle for Kostyantynivka continues
items.standfirst: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky said on Sunday that fighting was continuing for the eastern town of Kostyantynivka, rejecting Moscow's claim that Russian forces had captured the strategic settlement. Zelensky also warned Russia was preparing a new wave of large-scale attacks ahead of this week's NATO summit in Turkey, where he is expected to meet US President Donald Trump.
items.content: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky said on Sunday that fighting was continuing for the eastern town of Kostyantynivka, rejecting Moscow's claim that Russian forces had captured the strategic settlement. Zelensky also warned Russia was preparing a new wave of large-scale attacks ahead of this week's NATO summit in Turkey, where he is expected to meet US President Donald Trump.

ai_summary: Russian attacks kill 11 in Ukraine
Attacks occur on eve of NATO summit
Zelenskyy warns of likely Russian attack
Fighting continues for Kostyantynivka town
Russia prepares for new wave of attacks

clusters.title: Russia launches deadly attacks on Kyiv on eve of Nato summit
clusters.neutral_headline: Russia Launches Deadly Attacks On Kyiv

items.title: Russia launches deadly attacks on Kyiv on eve of Nato summit
items.standfirst: At least nine killed in the Ukraine capital in the second major assault on the city and its surrounds in less than a weekRussian missiles and drones ⁠struck Kyiv early on Monday, killing at least nine people and heavily damaging apartment blocks and other buildings, officials said, just a few days after ⁠the deadliest assault ⁠on the Ukrainian capital ​this year.“Nine deaths and 46 wounded have now been confirmed as a result of the Russian attack (including five wounded children),” Tymur Tkachenko, head of the Kyiv region’s military administration, said. “Sadly, this is not the final toll. Rescue operations are still ongoing.” Continue reading...
items.content: At least nine killed in the Ukraine capital in the second major assault on the city and its surrounds in less than a weekRussian missiles and drones ⁠struck Kyiv early on Monday, killing at least nine people and heavily damaging apartment blocks and other buildings, officials said, just a few days after ⁠the deadliest assault ⁠on the Ukrainian capital ​this year.“Nine deaths and 46 wounded have now been confirmed as a result of the Russian attack (including five wounded children),” Tymur Tkachenko, head of the Kyiv region’s military administration, said. “Sadly, this is not the final toll. Rescue operations are still ongoing.” Continue reading...

items.title: Live: Russian missile attack on Kyiv region kills at least ten
items.standfirst: Russia struck Ukraine's Kyiv region with ballistic missiles on Monday, killing at least ten people and wounding dozens, authorities said, on the eve of a NATO summit in Turkey. The assault was the second on the capital and its surroundings in less than a week and came as both sides increased long-range attacks, underlining the growing reach of the war more than four years after Russia launched its full-scale invasion. Follow our liveblog for the latest developments.
items.content: Russia struck Ukraine's Kyiv region with ballistic missiles on Monday, killing at least ten people and wounding dozens, authorities said, on the eve of a NATO summit in Turkey. The assault was the second on the capital and its surroundings in less than a week and came as both sides increased long-range attacks, underlining the growing reach of the war more than four years after Russia launched its full-scale invasion. Follow our liveblog for the latest developments.

ai_summary: Russian missiles and drones strike Kyiv
At least nine people killed in the attack
46 wounded including five children
Rescue operations are still ongoing
Attack occurs before NATO summit in Turkey

clusters.title: Delta Air Lines flight hit by firework while landing at Midway International Airport

items.title: Delta Air Lines flight hit by firework while landing at Midway International Airport
items.standfirst: A Delta Air Lines flight landing in Chicago was hit by a firework as it was coming to land at Midway International Airport on Saturday.
items.content: A Delta Air Lines flight landing in Chicago was hit by a firework as it was coming to land at Midway International Airport on Saturday.

items.title: 'Definitely felt a big bang': Delta plane hit by firework while landing in Chicago
items.standfirst: The plane had 52 passengers and six crew onboard. No injuries were reported.
items.content: The plane had 52 passengers and six crew onboard. No injuries were reported.

clusters.title: Major Ukrainian drone attack on Russia strikes St Petersburg oil terminal
clusters.neutral_headline: Ukrainian Drones Strike Russian Oil Terminal

items.title: Major Ukrainian drone attack on Russia strikes St Petersburg oil terminal
items.standfirst: Ukrainian drones have struck an oil terminal and port in St Petersburg and the surrounding region, Russian and Ukrainian officials say.
items.content: Ukrainian drones have struck an oil terminal and port in St Petersburg and the surrounding region, Russian and Ukrainian officials say.

items.title: Ukrainian drones hit St Petersburg oil terminal and nearby port
items.standfirst: St Petersburg governor reports no victims after ‘large-scale’ overnight attack that also hit Baltic port of VysotskUkraine launched a big overnight drone attack on St Petersburg and the surrounding area, hitting the city’s oil terminal and port infrastructure in the wider region.The St Petersburg governor, Alexander Beglov, said the city had been subjected to a “large-scale” drone attack that had hit its oil terminal. He said there were no casualties and the aftermath of the attack had been dealt with. Continue reading...
items.content: St Petersburg governor reports no victims after ‘large-scale’ overnight attack that also hit Baltic port of VysotskUkraine launched a big overnight drone attack on St Petersburg and the surrounding area, hitting the city’s oil terminal and port infrastructure in the wider region.The St Petersburg governor, Alexander Beglov, said the city had been subjected to a “large-scale” drone attack that had hit its oil terminal. He said there were no casualties and the aftermath of the attack had been dealt with. Continue reading...

ai_summary: Ukrainian drones hit St Petersburg oil terminal
Attack also hits nearby port and region
No casualties reported in the attack

Ukraine launches overnight drone attack
